sentences.translation: Arapski doručak je bogat i ukusan.
sentences.translationEn: The Arabic breakfast is rich and delicious.
They eat foul, hummus, and eggs.

sentences.arabic: الخُبْزُ العَرَبِيُّ جُزْءٌ أَسَاسِيٌّ مِنَ الفُطُورِ.
sentences.translation: Arapski hljeb je osnovni dio doručka.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic bread is an essential part of breakfast.

sentences.arabic: يَشْرَبُونَ الشَّايَ أَوِ القَهْوَةَ مَعَ الفُطُورِ.
sentences.translation: Piju čaj ili kafu uz doručak.
sentences.translationEn: They drink tea or coffee with breakfast.

sentences.translation: Doručak je najvažniji obrok u danu.
sentences.translationEn: Breakfast is the most important meal of the day.
